generation_notes.fallback: If AI generation fails, use Python Pillow to draw simplified cartoon versions
generation_notes.style_consistency: All elements must use the same cartoon style with soft lighting and clean edges
generation_notes.background: All game objects use white background, UI elements and particles use transparent background
